cases.description: Key distinguishing case: ISNA is FALSE for #DIV/0! -- it only recognizes #N/A specifically, per https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/is-functions-0f2d7971-6019-40a0-a171-f2d869135665 ('ISNA: Value refers to the #N/A error value')
ISNA is TRUE only for #N/A, the one case where ISERR disagrees with ISERROR/ISNA
ISNA is FALSE for a #VALUE! error (not #N/A)
